basic_details.job_title: BHU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Banaras Hindu University (BHU) has published the Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Research Associate (RA) position on a contractual basis. Candidates with a Doctorate (Ph.D./ MD/ MS/ MDS) or equivalent degree, or 3 years of research, teaching, and design & development experience after MVSc/ M.Pharm./ M.E./ M.Tech, and a maximum age of 35 years, are eligible to apply through Email via the official BHU website. The application process is open until 14-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Upper age limit relaxable up-to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate (PhD/MD/MS/MDS) or equivalent degree OR having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after MVSc/MPharm/ME/MTech
qualification.details: Research Associate : Doctorate (PhD/MD/MS/MDS) or equivalent degree OR having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after MVSc/MPharm/ME/MTech

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BHU Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BHU Research Associate (RA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate : Doctorate (PhD/MD/MS/MDS) or equivalent degree OR having 3 years of research, teaching and design and development experience after MVSc/MPharm/ME/MTech

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Upper age limit relaxable up-to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women and physically handicapped candidates.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BHU Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application via email for BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 is 14 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Research Associate (RA) post in the BHU recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Research Associate (RA) post at BHU?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate (RA) post at BHU ranges from Rs. 58,000 to Rs. 67,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate (RA) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Research Associate (RA) at BHU?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Doctorate (PhD/MD/MS/MDS) or equivalent degree, or 3 years of research/teaching experience after MVSc/MPharm/ME/MTech.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BHU Research Associate (RA) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate (RA) posts at BHU primarily involves an interview with eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the BHU Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application with bio-data and self-attested documents via email to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for BHU Research Associate (RA)?
faq.answer: The job location for the Research Associate (RA) position is Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, specifically at Banaras Hindu University (BHU).

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for the BHU Research Associate (RA) Recruitment is R/SRICC/P-25/0886/2026-27/1840, as per the official notification.
